sub_pixel_system.notes: Turn-based strategy game; sub-pixel precision not applicable

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Strategy Movement
special_mechanics.description: Hex-grid based tactical battlefield movement system. Troops move across hexagonal terrain tiles with different movement costs based on unit type and terrain. Infantry, cavalry, guerrilla units, and engineers have distinct movement capabilities.

special_mechanics.name: Terrain-Based Movement Restrictions
special_mechanics.description: Different unit types have varying terrain traversal capabilities. Cavalry requires open terrain; guerrilla units can move through impassable terrain; engineers can create/destroy bridges affecting movement paths.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Turn-based strategy game with no character jump/gravity physics. Movement is entirely tactical unit-based on hex grids with terrain and unit-type modifiers. No platforming or real-time movement physics applicable.
